units.description: Add avatar upload API endpoint with file validation (max 5MB, PNG/JPG/GIF only)

test_criteria.description: POST /api/avatar with valid PNG returns 200 and stores file

units.description: Add avatar resize service (256x256) using sharp, triggered after upload
Add AvatarUpload React component with drag-and-drop, preview, and error display

test_criteria.description: After selecting a file, component shows image preview
When API returns error, component displays the error message

test_strategy.unit_tests: Component tests with mocked API. Image resize with test fixtures.
test_strategy.integration_tests: API endpoint tests with real file uploads against test server.
test_strategy.e2e_tests: Full upload flow via Playwright (deferred to QA)

architecture_notes: Use existing file upload middleware pattern from src/server/middleware/upload.ts. Image resize is a separate service for testability. UI follows existing component patterns with React Hook Form.
